Metadata.title: Studi Aperti — Artists & Studios of Upper Tiber Valley
Metadata.description: Discover artists and open studios in the Upper Tiber Valley, Umbria, Italy. Browse the interactive map and find local ceramics, painting, sculpture, and more.
Metadata.ogTitle: Studi Aperti — Artists & Studios of Upper Tiber Valley
Metadata.ogDescription: Discover artists and open studios in the Upper Tiber Valley, Umbria, Italy.

Hero.title: Discover Art in the Upper Tiber Valley
Hero.subtitle: Studi Aperti is an opportunity to discover Art and Artists in their Studios in the Upper Tiber Valley and beyond. Many artists' studios are available all year round. For the months of June and July however we dust down our studios and make them visitor friendly. Scroll the map and find an artist near you or scroll the artists and find work you want to see. We look forward to meeting you.

Homepage.studiosFound: {count, plural, one {# studio} other {# studios}} found

AddListing.title: Add Your Studio
AddListing.description: List your studio or workshop on the Studi Aperti map. Your listing will be reviewed before going live.
AddListing.successMessage: Your listing has been submitted for review. An admin will approve it shortly, and it will then appear on the map.
AddListing.successReminder: Remember your 4-digit edit code to make changes later.

ManageListing.title: Manage Your Listing
ManageListing.verifyDescription: Enter your studio name or email and your 4-digit edit code to access your listing.
ManageListing.editDescription: Edit your listing below. Changes go live immediately.
ManageListing.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your listing?
ManageListing.removedMessage: Your listing has been removed from the map.

ListingForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell visitors about your studio, your art, and what they can expect...
ListingForm.editCodeDescription: Choose a 4-digit code to edit your listing later. Keep it safe!

Validation.addressRequired: Address with map location is required
Validation.imageRequired: At least one image is required
Validation.contactRequired: At least an email or phone number is required
Validation.editCodeFormat: Edit code must be exactly 4 digits

AdminLogin.title: Studi Aperti
AdminLogin.subtitle: Admin Login
AdminLogin.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link in your email to sign in.
AdminLogin.onlyAuthorized: Only authorized admins can sign in.

AdminCallback.notAuthorized: You are not authorized as an admin.
AdminCallback.linkExpired: Login failed or link expired. Please try again.

AdminAcceptInvite.redirecting: You'll be redirected to the admin dashboard.
AdminAcceptInvite.invalidLink: Invalid or expired invite link. Please request a new invite.
